prestazioni: Engine swap to a 455ci (7.5L) Rocket V8 (W-30 code) with forged internals including Mahle 4032 alloy pistons (10.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Callies Performance. Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (280H/288H duration, .580/.590 lift) and ported/polished cylinder heads by Air Flow Research (AFR 325cc CNC heads) for 550+ HP on 93 octane.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a custom T4 divorced wastegate manifold by Stainless Works, feeding into a Spearco intercooler (800cfm core) and a custom 3.5" aluminum charge pipe setup. Boost controlled via a TurboSmart Hyper-Gate45 wastegate (15psi base) and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for sequential fuel injection and ignition timing.

Drivetrain upgrades including a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission swap with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 600 series) and a custom aluminum driveshaft by Inland Empire Driveline. Rear end reinforced with a Moser 12-bolt housing, 3.73:1 gears, and a Detroit Truetrac differential. Suspension converted to a Ridetech HQ Series coilover system with adjustable valving and 2.5" drop spindles for proper geometry.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (RB-TORO-01) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Rear bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed unit integrating dual 4" exhaust exits and a tow hook mount.

Custom 19x10" (front) and 20x12" (rear) BBS RS-GT wheels in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/20 rear). Brake system upgraded to a Wilwood 6-piston front caliper kit with 14" rotors and a 4-piston rear kit with 13" rotors, all painted gloss black with red caliper accents.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Alcantara headliner, Recaro Pole Position seats (retrimmed in black Alcantara with red stitching), and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (8-point bolt-in, TIG-welded). Dashboard replaced with a custom carbon fiber panel housing a Motec C127 digital dash and a custom billet aluminum shifter from B&M (T-handle style).
